title: verbascum simplex var. hispanicum
intro: Verbascum simplex var. hispanicum, also known as Spanish Mullein, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the mullein family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system. Herbal preparations of Spanish Mullein can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
